settings.text: Discover how Neoglyn utilizes clinical-grade microcurrent technology to stimulate ATP production, tighten facial muscles, and deliver visible lifting results in just five minutes a day.

settings.title: Boosts ATP Production
settings.text: Adenosine Triphosphate (ATP) is the energy currency of your cells. Neoglyn stimulates its production by up to 400%, accelerating collagen and elastin creation.

settings.title: Re-educates Muscles
settings.text: Targeted, low-level electrical currents painlessly stimulate facial muscles, training them to appear more lifted, toned, and contoured.

settings.title: Improves Circulation
settings.text: Enhanced blood flow delivers vital nutrients to your skin cells, resulting in a brighter, more radiant complexion immediately after use.

settings.title: Neoglyn Pro
settings.text:
✔ Clinical-grade 400 microamps
✔ App-connected personalized routines
✔ Visible results in 2 weeks
✔ 60-Day Guarantee

settings.title: Standard Devices
settings.text:
✖ Weak 100-200 microamps
✖ Generic, one-size-fits-all settings
✖ Results take months
✖ Restrictive 14-day return policies
